name: NEUBASE THERAPEUTICS INC
summary: NEUBASE THERAPEUTICS INC is a biotechnology company focused on discovering, developing, and commercializing genetic medicines to treat rare neuromuscular diseases. Headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, they are developing a platform of peptide-nucleic acid (PNA) based therapies designed to target the underlying genetic causes of these diseases. The company's approach aims to modulate gene expression and restore normal cellular function.
